scene_prose:
Sony A7R V, 50mm f/2.8, tripod at freestanding-tub height looking along the length of a 12-foot master bathroom spa. 6:40am — a high clerestory window above the far wall admits a single slant of cool blue-white morning light across the honed plaster ceiling; the rest of the room sits in a warm, still dimness. ISO 800, f/2.8.

The bathroom is a material exercise: a 1800mm free-standing oval tub in brushed concrete-effect cast stone centred against the far wall; book-matched Calacatta Viola marble behind it, mirror-polished. Brushed-bronze floor-mounted tub filler. Floor: herringbone honed travertine, 100x200 strips. Left wall: full-height matte plaster panel with slim inset bronze shelf. A woman in a white waffle-weave robe stands at the tub rear, back to camera, one hand on the stone rim.
composition_notes:
PEOPLE DO NOT DISPLACE TEXT: the woman at the tub is a scene element only — all text is mandatory at full prominent size.
'SINDHUBHAVAN' is one unbroken 12-character word (S-I-N-D-H-U-B-H-A-V-A-N) — no split, slash, or hyphen.
THE ZONED TRIPTYCH: three sovereign horizontal zones — none encroaches on another.

TOP BAND (upper 24% of canvas): deep charcoal backing (#2B2420) — no photography. SINDHUBHAVAN ROAD in HEAVY cream luxury display serif filling the band from 5% to 93% canvas width. Monumental — each letter legible at arm's length. AHMEDABAD in tracked geometric gold caps on a sub-line below. 4 & 5 BHK as a framed inline pill in brushed-gold rule, centred below AHMEDABAD. A thin gold hairline rule immediately above SINDHUBHAVAN. Vertical gold hairlines separate sub-elements. Top-right corner of band: clear for logo compositing.

PHOTO ZONE (middle 54%): full-bleed photograph, edge-to-edge — NO text overlays EXCEPT the sample badge. Badge SAMPLE FLAT READY: bottom-third of photo zone, centred, solid deep-charcoal backing matching the top band (#2B2420), gold hairline border, bold geometric gold sans. LARGE.

FOOTER STRIP (lower 22%): solid warm ivory backing (#F5EDD8). THREE equal columns separated by thin vertical gold hairlines. LEFT: CLUBCLASS AMENITIES with a fine-line gold icon above. CENTRE: STARTING AT in small tracked caps / ₹3 CR in LARGE HEAVY gold display serif (dominant, 3x the label cap height) / ONWARDS in small tracked caps below — the numeral is the visual event. RIGHT: 30+ STOREY TOWER with a fine-line gold icon above. All footer text in deep charcoal (#2B2420) — NEVER light text on the ivory ground. Zone boundary: a thin gold hairline at the photo/footer seam.

FLAT TYPOGRAPHY: all text is flat and scene-integrated — no bevel, sheen, gloss, or 3D depth.
headline: The morning starts here.

scene_prose:
Sony A7R V, 28mm f/2.5, tripod at 145cm on a 30-storey rooftop terrace looking south at blue hour. 7:20pm — deep cobalt sky at 5500K; warm amber city lights gridding the horizon at 3000K. ISO 1600, f/2.5.

A teak outdoor dining table 3.6m long runs parallel to the frameless glass railing: six people mid-dinner — candlelight, wine glasses, animated conversation, one person gesturing. Low votives, a long stem arrangement, layered table linen. Thirty floors of city below and behind the guests. Left and right frame edges flanked by slim plaster pergola reveals. Brushed-brass hardware. The guests are small against the scale of the cobalt sky and city grid below them.
composition_notes:
PEOPLE DO NOT DISPLACE TEXT: the six guests are scene elements only — all text is mandatory at full prominent size.
'SINDHUBHAVAN' is one unbroken 12-character word — no split, slash, or hyphen.
THE GOLDEN ARCHWAY DEVICE: the plaster pergola reveals on left and right edges form the structural text columns. A thin gold hairline traces each reveal inner edge.

SINDHUBHAVAN ROAD: HEAVY gold luxury display serif, centred in the upper cobalt sky at 8-22% canvas height — sky gives contrast with no backing. Spans 72% canvas width. Each letter legible. AHMEDABAD in tracked geometric gold caps below at 25% canvas height.

Campaign headline 'The view belongs to everyone at this table.' — bold italic display serif, warm cream (#F5EDD8), at roughly 34% canvas height, centred in the open sky between the location and the guests. Clear space above and below.

'4 & 5 BHK' — NOT in the sky. On the LEFT pergola reveal at roughly 50% canvas height. HEAVY gold display serif, large — pergola shadow provides contrast.

PRICE — the price module ALWAYS gets a backing. Solid deep-burgundy pill (#3D0C02), gold hairline, mid-RIGHT at 55% canvas height on the right pergola reveal. Inside: FROM in small tracked caps / ₹3 CR in LARGE HEAVY gold serif (dominant, 2.5x the FROM cap height) / ONWARDS in small tracked caps. Never three equal-weight lines.

Badge 'SAMPLE FLAT READY' — compact burgundy pill (#3D0C02), gold hairline, bottom-left at 74% canvas height just above the table line. Bold geometric cream sans. LARGE.

FOOTER: slim deep-burgundy strip (#3D0C02), full width, bottom 8%. Single tracked gold line: CLUBCLASS AMENITIES  ·  3,300–6,100 SQ FT. Two items only.

FLAT TYPOGRAPHY: all text flat and scene-integrated — no bevel, sheen, gloss, or 3D depth.
Top-right corner of canvas: clear — logo compositing zone.
headline: The view belongs to everyone at this table.

scene_prose:
Sony A7R V, 20mm f/8, tripod on the marble floor at one end of a double-height living room, looking across toward a gallery bridge and the west-facing clerestory above it. 4:45pm — low afternoon sun cuts a wedge of warm amber (2700K) diagonally from the clerestory across the lower half of the facing wall; upper half stays in cool shadow. ISO 100, f/8.

The room is completely empty, no people. Floor: large-format honed White Sivec marble, 1200x2400, mirror-polished — the diagonal light reflects softly in the floor below. Facing wall: smooth warm plaster, double-height, interrupted only by the gallery bridge at 4.5m — a minimal steel-and-glass walkway. Left wall: raw travertine stone fireplace surround. Right wall: floor-to-ceiling blackened-steel shelving. The room is architecturally precise and still.
composition_notes:
NO PEOPLE — the room architecture is the protagonist. DISTINCT SKELETON: location anchors in the shadow zone ABOVE the diagonal light band.
'SINDHUBHAVAN' is one unbroken 12-character word — no split, slash, or hyphen.

THE ARCHITECTURAL DEAD ZONE DEVICE: the diagonal light terminates at a sharp shadow edge on the facing plaster wall — text lives ONLY in shadow or in the dark marble floor, never on a sunlit surface.

SINDHUBHAVAN ROAD: HEAVY warm-gold luxury display serif in the SHADOW ZONE of the facing wall, above the diagonal light band, at 20-36% canvas height. Deep shadow gives full contrast — no backing needed. Spans 78% canvas width. Each letter legible. Thin warm hairlines flanking. AHMEDABAD in tracked geometric gold caps directly below at 38% canvas height.

Campaign headline '3,300 sq ft of double height.' — bold italic display serif, deep charcoal (#3A2D1C), at 54% canvas height ON THE BRIGHT MARBLE FLOOR. White marble = dark-on-light contrast. No backing — charcoal on white marble is sufficient.

'4 & 5 BHK' — at roughly 46% canvas height in the shadow zone LEFT of the gallery bridge, against the blackened-steel shelving wall. HEAVY gold display serif, ~50% of location name cap height. Scene shadow provides contrast — no backing.

PRICE — the price module ALWAYS gets a backing. At 65% canvas height, BOTTOM-RIGHT, in the darkest corner of the marble floor. Solid warm-plaster pill (#D4C4A8 — the colour of the plaster wall itself, a scene material), thin gold hairline, soft directional drop shadow (2% canvas radius, from left, matching the key light). Inside: FROM in small tracked caps / ₹3 CR in LARGE HEAVY gold display serif (dominant, 2.5x FROM cap height) / ONWARDS in small tracked caps. Scene-material pill — not a generic overlay.

Badge 'SAMPLE FLAT READY' — at 28% canvas height, UPPER-RIGHT of the shadow zone. Compact plaster-tone pill (#D4C4A8), gold hairline, matching soft shadow. Bold geometric gold sans. Generously sized.

Supporting specs — FLOAT in shadow zone below AHMEDABAD: CLUBCLASS AMENITIES on one line, 30+ STOREY TOWER below. Fine tracked gold caps on thin gold hairlines. Two items; no padding.

FLAT TYPOGRAPHY: all text flat and scene-integrated — no bevel, sheen, gloss, or 3D depth.
Top-left corner: clear — logo compositing zone.
headline: 3,300 sq ft of double height.

scene_prose:
Sony A7R V, 85mm f/2.8, tripod at 130cm inside the apartment at the sliding-door threshold, looking outward through the open frameless door onto a cantilevered balcony where a man stands at the glass railing. 8:10pm — deep indigo-violet dusk at 5000K; city grid below is full warm amber. ISO 1600, f/2.8.

The balcony slab cantilevers 2.4m; the railing is single-panel frameless 19mm glass with a slim dark-powder-coated rail. Through the figure: thirty floors of city below, indigo sky above, amber grid to the horizon. Inside the apartment peripherally: warm interior cove lighting on the edge of a dark timber floating ceiling. Floor: polished basalt tile, 600x600, full black — faintly picking up the city amber glow. The figure is a sharp dark silhouette, small against the sky.
composition_notes:
PEOPLE DO NOT DISPLACE TEXT: the silhouetted man is a scene element — all text is mandatory at full prominent size.
'SINDHUBHAVAN' is one unbroken 12-character word — no split, slash, or hyphen.

THE DEPTH INTEGRATION DEVICE: the indigo sky above and behind the figure is the primary text zone — dark, open, at depth. Text appears IN the sky, not as a graphic overlay.

SINDHUBHAVAN ROAD: HEAVY gold luxury display serif centred in the UPPER INDIGO SKY at 10-25% canvas height. Sky gives full contrast — no backing. Spans 68% canvas width. Each letter legible. Thin gold editorial hairlines flanking. AHMEDABAD in tracked geometric gold caps at 28% canvas height.

Campaign headline 'A home for people who choose their altitude.' — bold italic display serif, warm cream (#F8F4F0), at 38% canvas height, centred in the sky between the location and the figure. ~40% of location name cap height.

'4 & 5 BHK' — NOT in the sky. Anchored inside the apartment on the dark timber ceiling edge, upper-RIGHT at roughly 20% canvas height. HEAVY gold display serif, large — warm timber in near-dark gives contrast.

PRICE — the price module ALWAYS gets a backing. At 60% canvas height, LEFT of the figure, on the near-black basalt floor inside the apartment. Slim deep-navy pill (#1A1F2B — sky tone, a scene material), gold hairline, soft 2% directional shadow (from upper right, matching ambient sky direction). Inside: FROM in small tracked caps / ₹3 CR in LARGE HEAVY gold display serif (dominant, 2.5x FROM cap height) / ONWARDS in small tracked caps. Navy pill reads as sky-toned material.

Badge 'SAMPLE FLAT READY' — upper-left at 22% canvas height, on the dark interior timber ceiling zone. Compact navy pill (#1A1F2B), gold hairline, bold geometric cream sans. Generously sized.

Supporting specs — FLOAT in the city-glow zone, far right at 40-52% canvas height: CLUBCLASS AMENITIES above, 30+ STOREY TOWER below. Fine tracked gold caps. Two items; ambient city glow gives soft contrast. No backing.

FLAT TYPOGRAPHY: all text flat and scene-integrated — no bevel, sheen, gloss, or 3D depth.
Bottom-left corner: clear — logo compositing zone.
headline: A home for people who choose their altitude.

scene_prose:
Sony A7R V, 35mm f/5.6, tripod at 90cm at the far end of a 14m kitchen, looking along a 4.2m island toward floor-to-ceiling frameless glazing. 9:30am — cool flat overcast at 6000K; even, directionless light reveals every surface simultaneously. ISO 200, f/5.6.

The kitchen is completely empty, no people. Island worktop: 60mm honed Nero Marquina marble slab, single piece, book-matched, running the full 4.2m. Base cabinetry: matte lacquer in deep forest-night (#1A231A). Left wall: full-height run of steam oven, warming drawer, and integrated fridge in blackened steel — frameless, flush. Right wall: open display shelving in blackened steel with textured ceramics. Ceiling: exposed polished concrete, 3.0m. Floor: large-format honed basalt, 1200x1200. Through the glazing: a dense podium green wall and pale sky. The scene is a pure material argument — every surface earns its place by finish alone.
composition_notes:
NO PEOPLE — kitchen material surfaces are the protagonist. DISTINCT SKELETON: location in the glazing zone, headline on the marble worktop, price in the dark cabinetry base.
'SINDHUBHAVAN' is one unbroken 12-character word — no split, slash, or hyphen.

THE HORIZON ANCHOR DEVICE: the island worktop and cabinetry line form a strong horizontal datum at 60% canvas height — dark cabinetry and basalt below, marble and glazing above. Text anchors to these natural bands.

SINDHUBHAVAN ROAD: HEAVY cream luxury display serif in the UPPER GLAZING ZONE at 16-30% canvas height, against the mid-green garden wall through the glass — cream on mid-green has instant contrast, no backing. Spans 76% canvas width. Monumental. AHMEDABAD in tracked geometric cream caps at 32% canvas height.

Campaign headline 'Material is the message.' — bold italic display serif, deep charcoal (#1A1A1A), placed ON THE MARBLE WORKTOP surface at 52% canvas height, left of the island centre. White marble = dark-on-light contrast. No backing — charcoal on white Nero Marquina is sufficient. The headline sits as if etched.

'4 & 5 BHK' — at 40% canvas height, RIGHT side of the appliance column, using the blackened-steel door faces as backdrop. HEAVY cream display serif, large — cream on near-black steel = instant contrast, no backing.

PRICE — the price module ALWAYS gets a backing. At 68% canvas height, BOTTOM-CENTRE-RIGHT, where dark cabinetry meets basalt floor. Pill fill: the cool grey of the basalt floor itself (#3A3A3C — scene material), gold hairline, soft 2% directional shadow (from upper left, matching the diffused glazing). Inside: FROM in small tracked caps / ₹3 CR in LARGE HEAVY gold display serif (dominant, 2.5x FROM cap height) / ONWARDS in small tracked caps. Basalt-grey pill reads as the floor material.

Badge 'STEP INSIDE — SAMPLE FLAT READY' — upper-left at 10% canvas height, against exposed concrete ceiling. Compact basalt-grey pill (#3A3A3C), platinum hairline, bold geometric cream sans. Generously sized.

FOOTER: narrow solid slate-navy strip (#1E2430), full canvas width, bottom 9%. CLUBCLASS AMENITIES  ·  30+ STOREY TOWER in tracked bold geometric cream caps. Clear and readable.

FLAT TYPOGRAPHY: all text flat and scene-integrated — no bevel, sheen, gloss, or 3D depth.
Bottom-right corner of canvas: clear — logo compositing zone.
headline: Material is the message.
